nodes.title: Video-7-end
widgets_values: The complete modern minimalist backyard rests in perfect stillness. A very subtle warm golden light shift passes slowly across the scene, softly kissing the white sofa, green plants and concrete patio. Everything calm and completely still. Camera completely static, front view eye level. Cinematic slow breathable hold, three to five seconds, realistic.
